/usr/bin/c++  -fno-exceptions -fno-rtti -g -fsanitize=address CMakeFiles/db_bench.dir/util/histogram.cc.o CMakeFiles/db_bench.dir/util/testutil.cc.o CMakeFiles/db_bench.dir/benchmarks/db_bench.cc.o -o db_bench  libleveldb.a lib/libgmockd.a -lgflags lib/libgtestd.a third_party/benchmark/src/libbenchmark.a -lsnappy -ltcmalloc -lrt
